Home Principles Propose a Session Participate
Safety Third

Help Make Safety Third Great!

Do you have an idea for an activity, workshop, or session that could create opportunities for Burn organizers and volunteers to learn / share / network etc? If so, click the link below and fill out the form to send us your proposal:

S3 2026 Session Proposal Form

Session proposal deadline is April 10th end of day.

You must also also register as a participant or you will not be able to come.

Here is a list of some of the sessions proposed so far:

  • Leadership & Organizational Development
  • Vision Posters
  • Basic first aid
  • Herding Cats: How to Get People to Respond in 2026
  • Fire - Rangers
  • Ranger training
  • Pharmacology
  • Medical training
  • Fire art construction/inspection
  • Rangers, ICS, Radios
  • Resilient Activism
  • Radio training
  • Burn perimeter for participant safety
  • Discussion: Beyond burns — developing new types of events
  • How to Have Healthy Conflict
  • Flame effect fire safety and how to build basic flame effects
  • Radios
  • Intro to ICS
  • How to Operate Sound Core
  • Perimeter Lead
  • Line Sweep (MOOP is prizes!)
  • Getting Organized: Simple PM Tools to Minimize Volunteer Chaos
If you have any questions you can reach out to us at safetythird@fireflyartscollective.org

Website made by Sam(antha). Any questions about web design can be directed to olleicua@gmail.com
